summary: Iteration 7 verified ALL new additions: ElevenLabs→OpenAI TTS fallback, /api/ai/voices full shape, JSON error body on /api/ai/voices/elevenlabs (key lacks scopes — expected), explicit openai provider override, chat language picker (EN/ZU/YO/MAA with ZU active by default for Ajani and switch to EN works), LAB outer tile auto-opens TeachingWorkbench with sandbox pre-expanded, 3 mentor cards + speak buttons fire POST /api/ai/tts, Power↔Bridge tab switch rerenders sliders, failure-vision toggle on/off works, Subjects→TeachMe path with 'power systems' topic auto-selects Power lab, and abort-on-close on BlueprintWorkbench (close panel mid-LLM-job) produces 0 console errors confirming useAtlasJob/useTTS cleanup wires properly. Backend: 6/6 new pytest cases pass + previous 11/11 still pass. Frontend: 14/14 manual flow checks pass. HUD visuals untouched (rings, core, date/year overlays intact).

minor.issue: When ElevenLabs returns 401 missing_permissions the server prints the raw exception to stdout via print() — fine for dev, but consider a structured logger and redacted message for prod.

Currently 503 ('not configured') is never returned when key IS set but lacks voices_read scope — instead returns 502 with raw SDK exception in 'detail'. Body is valid JSON so passes the test, but the message echoes ElevenLabs internal error structure. Consider sanitising the detail string.

issues: React warning: 'Received NaN for the %s attribute. ... children' fires once when sandbox first renders — likely a divide-by-zero in a derived metric formatting (Stability/Reliability shows 59.0 then briefly NaN). Cosmetic only, no broken UI.

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/ai/voices returns voices, elevenlabs_voices, persona_language, active_provider='elevenlabs', elevenlabs_model='eleven_multilingual_v2'
Backend POST /api/ai/tts {text:'hello', persona:'ajani'} → 200 audio/mpeg, X-AI-Provider='openai' (fallback), X-AI-Voice='onyx', X-AI-Language='zu'
Backend POST /api/ai/tts provider='openai' explicit → X-AI-Provider='openai' regardless of ElevenLabs key
Backend GET /api/ai/voices/elevenlabs → JSON error body with 'detail' key (not HTML traceback)
Backend POST /api/ai/tts language override propagates to X-AI-Language header
Frontend HUD smoke: ring-outer, ring-middle, ring-inner, atlas core, date/year all render
Frontend ChatPanel: chat-fab opens panel, chat-lang-picker present with 4 buttons (en/zu/yo/maa), ZU active by default for Ajani, click EN switches active class
Frontend LAB tile (ring-outer-lab) auto-opens TeachingWorkbench with forceSandbox=true — sandbox + teach-sandbox-wrap visible immediately
Frontend Power lab: 4 sliders (sunlight, angle, temperature, battery) + 3 mentor cards (ajani/minerva/hermes) + 3 speak buttons all present
Frontend Sandbox tab switch: Bridge tab updates title to 'Bridge Failure Lab' + rerenders 4 sliders (supports, span, material, load)
Frontend Sandbox failure-vision toggle: first click shows sandbox-failure-vision, second click hides it
Frontend Sandbox mentor speak (ajani) fires POST /api/ai/tts request
Frontend Subjects → Teach Me with 'power systems' topic + teach-sandbox-toggle → Power tab auto-active, power sliders render
Frontend Abort-on-close: BlueprintWorkbench generate started, panel closed mid-job → 0 console errors after unmount (useAtlasJob auto-cancel works)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Sanitise the raw ElevenLabs SDK error message in the /api/ai/voices/elevenlabs 502 detail to avoid echoing third-party internals.
OPTIONAL: Fix the one-shot React NaN warning in InteractiveSandbox when metrics are computed before sliders mount (guard with `Number.isFinite(x) ? x : 0`).
OPTIONAL: Replace the print() in the ElevenLabs fallback path with a structured logger.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_services.py: _resolve_provider() prefers ElevenLabs whenever the key is present, even if the key has no TTS scope. Every first call pays the cost of a failed ElevenLabs round-trip before falling back. Consider caching a 'eleven_lab_supports_tts' boolean after the first 401 so subsequent calls go straight to OpenAI (saves ~200-500 ms per call).

ai_services.py uses a module-level _TTS_CLIENT and _ELEVEN_CLIENT cache — good. But the ElevenLabs voices/get_all call is also wrapped in asyncio.to_thread on every request — consider caching the voices list for ~5 min since it changes rarely.

TTSRequest validator does not bound `speed` (model accepts 0.25-4.0 for OpenAI). Out-of-range values will surface as 500 from the SDK. Add Pydantic constraint: speed: float = Field(1.0, ge=0.25, le=4.0).
InteractiveSandbox produces a transient 'Received NaN for children' React warning — guard the derived score/metric values against NaN before passing into JSX text.

useAtlasJob cleanup verified working (no errors after panel close). useTTS AbortController behaviour was not directly stress-tested but no console errors fired when navigating away during a speak call.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ai_services_tts_routing.py (NEW — 6 pytest cases for ElevenLabs routing + OpenAI fallback + voices shape)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ElevenLabs key in /app/backend/.env intentionally lacks text_to_speech + voices_read scopes — the fallback to OpenAI for /api/ai/tts is EXPECTED, and /api/ai/voices/elevenlabs returning 502 is EXPECTED. Do NOT mark these as bugs. HUD visuals are LOCKED (rings/core/ghost rings — do not edit HUDInterface.js, DialRing.js, AtlasCore.js, GhostRings.js, ringStructure.js). The InteractiveSandbox component lives at /app/frontend/src/components/HUD/InteractiveSandbox.js and is embedded by TeachingWorkbench when forceSandbox prop is true (from LAB tile) or when the user clicks teach-sandbox-toggle. Mentor speak buttons fire POST /api/ai/tts; the network request body cannot always be read by Playwright's request.post_data but the request count > 0 is sufficient proof.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no regressions found this iteration. One cosmetic React NaN warning in InteractiveSandbox initial render (transient, does not break UI).
